method_summary: The paper evaluates ML engineering capabilities of AI agents using Kaggle competitions as tasks, establishing human baselines from Kaggle leaderboards and testing various language models with open-source scaffolds.
key_innovation: MLE-bench, a benchmark for evaluating ML engineering capabilities of AI agents using real-world Kaggle competitions.
datasets_used: Kaggle competitions (diverse set of challenging tasks)
best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieves at least the level of a Kaggle bronze medal in 16.9% of competitions.
limitations_stated: No explicit limitations mentioned in the provided text
title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
